headline: GE Vernova GridOS Launch Spurs Questions On Growth And Valuation
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) has launched GridOS for Transmission, a unified software platform for grid operators. The new solution is designed to help utilities make coordinated, near real-time decisions across the transmission grid. GridOS for Transmission targets rising electricity demand, renewable integration, and growing grid complexity. The launch is gaining industry recognition and highlights GE Vernova's focus on digital grid infrastructure. For investors tracking NYSE:GEV, the launch...

headline: Dow Jones Stocks: Honeywell Aerospace Looms As GE Stock Breaks Out
summary: Dow Jones stock Honeywell announced the formal board approval of plans to spin out its Honeywell Aerospace unit, as the conglomerate prepares to break up.  Honeywell stock popped above a key level.  On June 29, Honeywell's automation and aerospace businesses will become two independent, publicly traded companies.

headline: GE Aerospace Rises 12.2% in Six Months: How Should You Play the Stock?
summary: GE gains 12.2% in six months as commercial and defense aerospace demand fuel momentum, but costs and valuation remain concerns.
